name: Helen D's Chicken Barley Soup (for the Crockpot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the homemade chicken broth the night before and put it in the fridge to harden the fat, then remove.
2. Add 4 cups of the broth to the crockpot along with 4 cups of water.
3. Add the remaining ingredients: carrots, celery, onions, barley, sage leaves, savory or thyme, and cooked chicken.
4. Cook on low for 8-10 hours.
5. Makes 12 cups or 6 two-cup servings.
